rationale: P0 coverage is 100%, P1 coverage is 100% (target: 90%), and overall coverage is 100% (minimum: 80%). All 7 acceptance criteria are fully covered by 52 passing unit tests with 0 failures. Test quality is strong with both isolated unit tests and integration tests covering the full execution pipeline (PlaceholderResolver -> SafetyChecker -> MCP call -> absorbResult).
